jobs.job_title: Antino Labs Hiring Entry level DevOps Engineer Jobs 2026
jobs.job_description:
Antino Labs Private Limited is a global AI Consulting and Digital Transformation company delivering enterprise-grade software engineering solutions across cloud computing, DevOps transformation, data engineering, artificial intelligence, and platform modernization.

Engineering & Technology

With operations across India, UK, USA, and the Middle East, Antino Labs supports Fortune-level enterprises in building scalable, secure, cloud-native, and automated infrastructure systems using modern DevOps, SRE, and cloud engineering practices.

Job Overview

Antino Labs is hiring a DevOps Engineer responsible for designing, building, and maintaining scalable cloud infrastructure, automation pipelines, and production-grade deployment systems.

Consulting

The role focuses on Infrastructure as Code (IaC), CI/CD automation, Kubernetes orchestration, cloud security, monitoring, and high availability system design.

Key Responsibilities

• Design and implement Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform and CloudFormation

Jobs

• Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, GitHub Actions, and GitLab CI
• Deploy and manage containerized applications using Docker and Kubernetes
• Manage AWS, GCP, and Azure cloud infrastructure
• Implement cloud monitoring, logging, and alerting systems
• Optimize system performance, scalability, and reliability
• Work on production incident troubleshooting and root cause analysis

Software

• Implement DevSecOps security best practices in pipelines
• Manage Linux server environments and automation scripts
• Support disaster recovery (DR) and high availability (HA) systems
• Collaborate with development teams for release automation
• Improve deployment speed, stability, and infrastructure cost optimization

Required Skills

Cloud Platforms

• Amazon Web Services (AWS)

Cloud Storage

• Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
• Microsoft Azure (Preferred)

DevOps Tools

• Jenkins
• GitHub Actions
• GitLab CI/CD

• Shell scripting

Network Security

Good to Have

• Exposure to FinOps / Cloud Cost Optimization
• Experience with AI/ML infrastructure tools
• Knowledge of Kafka, Redis, PostgreSQL
• GitOps workflows
• Security scanning (SAST/DAST)

Engineering & Technology

Career Growth Path

• DevOps Engineer
• Senior DevOps Engineer

Career Resources & Planning

• Site Reliability Engineer (SRE)
• Cloud Engineer
• Platform Engineer
• DevSecOps Engineer
• Kubernetes Administrator
• Cloud Architect

Engineering & Technology

• Engineering Manager

DevOps Engineers Are Highly Demanded In

• AWS Cloud Engineering Jobs
• Kubernetes Administration Careers
• Terraform Infrastructure Engineer Jobs

Cloud Storage

• Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) Jobs
• Platform Engineering Careers

Salary Insights (India Market)

Network Security

Recently Asked Interview Questions

• What is Infrastructure as Code (IaC)?

Managing infrastructure using code instead of manual configuration.

Engineering & Technology

• What is Kubernetes used for?

Container orchestration, scaling, and deployment automation.

• Difference between Docker and Kubernetes?

Docker creates containers, Kubernetes manages them at scale.

• What is CI/CD?

Automated build, test, and deployment pipeline.

Jobs

• What is DevSecOps?

• What is Terraform?

Tool for infrastructure provisioning using code.

Resume Tips for DevOps Jobs

Career Resources & Planning

AI - DevOps Architect

Experience: 12–18 Years

Location: Bangalore

Role Overview

We are looking for an experienced AI-DevOps Architect to lead the modernization of enterprise engineering platforms by combining DevOps best practices with AI-driven engineering capabilities. The ideal candidate will drive CI/CD transformation, establish agent-ready development environments, integrate AI into engineering workflows, and enable teams to adopt scalable, secure, and efficient software delivery practices.

Key Responsibilities

CI/CD Modernization
• Modernize and migrate legacy Jenkins pipelines to GitHub Actions.
• Design and implement reusable workflows, templates, and engineering standards to reduce platform fragmentation.
• Enhance observability, monitoring, and traceability across software delivery pipelines.
• Standardize CI/CD practices across engineering teams and business units.

AI-Assisted Engineering
• Leverage AI technologies to accelerate code migrations, code analysis, testing, and documentation generation.
• Build secure, repeatable AI-driven workflows with strong validation and governance practices.
• Identify and implement high-impact AI use cases that improve engineering productivity.

Agent-Ready Repositories
• Define repository standards, including metadata, documentation, instructions, templates, and governance controls.
• Ensure repositories are structured to support AI-powered tools while maintaining security and compliance.
• Establish best practices for repository organization and developer experience.

AI Agent Workflows & Governance
• Integrate AI capabilities across GitHub, CI/CD platforms, Jira, and related engineering ecosystems.
• Define guardrails for access control, security reviews, code validation, approvals, and compliance.
• Implement human-in-the-loop validation mechanisms to ensure safe and reliable AI adoption.

Platform Enablement & Adoption
• Drive adoption of standardized DevOps and AI engineering practices across teams.
• Develop reusable starter kits, golden paths, documentation, and onboarding frameworks.
• Gather feedback from engineering teams and continuously improve platform capabilities and developer experience.

Required Experience & Skills

DevOps & Platform Engineering
• Strong hands-on experience with GitHub Actions and Jenkins.
• Proven expertise in designing reusable workflows, developer platforms, and automation frameworks.
• Strong programming skills in Python, Bash, TypeScript, or Go.
• Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and cloud-native application delivery.
• Deep understanding of GitHub ecosystem components, including Pull Requests, CODEOWNERS, branch protection rules, and repository governance.
• Experience leading enterprise-wide CI/CD transformation initiatives.

AI & Agentic Engineering
• Hands-on experience with AI-powered development tools such as GitHub Copilot, Claude, Cursor, or similar platforms.
• Practical experience applying AI to software engineering activities including code analysis, testing, migration, and documentation.
• Expertise in managing repository-level AI context, prompts, instructions, and knowledge assets.
• Strong understanding of AI risks, including hallucinations, security vulnerabilities, data leakage, and over-automation.
• Experience implementing human-in-the-loop validation processes and responsible AI practices.

Cloud & Automation
• Experience with cloud platforms such as Azure, AWS, or GCP.
• Knowledge of Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation, or equivalent).
• Familiarity with DevSecOps practices and security automation.

Leadership Expectations
• End-to-End Ownership: Drive platform modernization initiatives from strategy through execution.
• Execution Focus: Deliver practical tooling, automation, and measurable outcomes.
• Innovation Mindset: Translate emerging AI capabilities into scalable engineering solutions.
• Strategic Thinking: Balance enterprise standardization with project-specific needs.
• Influential Leadership: Lead by example, mentor teams, and drive adoption through tangible results.
• Continuous Improvement: Foster a culture of automation, innovation, and engineering excellence.

Preferred Qualifications
• Experience leading large-scale DevOps transformation programs.
• Exposure to AI-powered software development lifecycle (SDLC) frameworks.
• Experience building Internal Developer Platforms (IDP) and developer self-service capabilities.
• Relevant certifications in Cloud, Kubernetes, DevOps, or AI technologies are preferred.

Location: Bangalore

Experience: 12–18 Years

Employment Type: Full-Time

- Understand and implement RPA solutions

- Understanding of AI / Machine Learning fundamentals
- Basic knowledge of RPA (Robotic Process Automation)
- Familiarity with DevOps concepts
- Knowledge of Power BI (Reporting & Dashboards)
• *Eligibility Criteria:**
- 2022, 2023, 2024 passed-out candidates
- Freshers (01 year experience)
- Bachelors degree (B.Com / B.Sc / B.Tech or related fields)
• *Benefits:**
- Health insurance
- Life insurance
- Provident Fund

Please note that the work location is in person.

Job Details

Company: Raphus Solutions

Management

Location: Hyderabad, India

As a DevOps Engineer at Emerson, you will oversee the end-to-end lifecycle of machine learning models, from deployment to monitoring and maintenance. You will collaborate closely with data scientists, machine learning engineers, and development teams to ensure efficient integration of ML models into production systems, delivering high performance.

Your responsibilities will include:
- Deploying and managing machine learning models in production environments, focusing on scalability, reliability, and performance.
- Designing and implementing CI/CD pipelines for ML models to streamline development and deployment processes.
- Developing and maintaining infrastructure for model deployment, including containerization (e.g., Docker), orchestration (e.g., Kubernetes), and cloud services (e.g., AWS, Google Cloud, Azure).
- Monitoring model performance, addressing issues, and conducting regular maintenance to uphold accuracy and effectiveness.
- Ensuring model deployment and data handling comply with security and regulatory requirements, implementing standard data privacy practices.
- Creating and updating documentation for deployment processes, model performance, and system configurations, providing detailed reports to collaborators.
- Identifying and implementing enhancements to model performance, deployment processes, and infrastructure efficiency.
- Participating in Scrum events such as Sprint Planning, Sprint Review, and Sprint Retrospective.

To excel in this role, you should possess:
- Bachelor's degree in computer science, Data Science, Statistics, or related field, or equivalent experience.
- 7+ years of experience in ML Ops, DevOps, or related roles, with expertise in deploying and managing ML models in production environments.
- Proficiency in containerization technologies (e.g., Docker), orchestration platforms (e.g., Kubernetes), and cloud services (Azure, AWS).
- Experience with CI/CD tools for automating deployment pipelines and monitoring tools for model performance.
- Preferred qualifications include prior experience in the engineering domain, working with Scaled Agile Framework (SAFe) teams, knowledge of data engineering and ETL processes, familiarity with version control systems (e.g., Git), and understanding of machine learning model lifecycle management.

Emerson offers competitive compensation and benefits programs, comprehensive medical and insurance coverage, and a commitment to diversity, equity, and inclusion. The company supports foreign nationals through Work Authorization Sponsorship, fosters an inclusive environment for employee development, and prioritizes safety across its global network and facilities.

Emerson values diversity, equity, and inclusion to create a culture where every employee's unique experiences and perspectives are respected, fostering innovation and the best solutions for customers. This role is for one of our client companies — a VC-backed startup that has raised $2 million USD in funding.

Salary:
25LPA - 35LPA

Apply once and, if selected, get access to up to 20 remote and onsite interview opportunities.

What we're building

CodeRound AI matches the top 5% tech talent with some of the fastest-growing, VC-backed AI and product startups across Silicon Valley and India.
Top-tier startups across the US, UK, EU, UAE, and India trust CodeRound to hire exceptional software engineers, infrastructure specialists, and AI builders.

🛠️ What you'll do

• Own and scale the company's Kubernetes-based infrastructure platform

• Drive the CI/CD transformation, including GitOps workflows, release automation, and multi-environment deployments

• Build secure and reliable deployment pipelines with proper QA gates and production promotion processes

• Manage Kubernetes workloads, autoscaling, ingress, service mesh, and infrastructure configurations

• Lead on-premise deployments for enterprise customers

• Migrate and manage secrets using modern secrets management platforms

• Maintain branch protection policies, CI gates, and infrastructure security best practices

• Own observability systems including metrics, logging, tracing, dashboards, and alerting

• Monitor platform reliability, troubleshoot incidents, and improve system resilience

• Manage backups, disaster recovery, and infrastructure reliability across production systems

• Partner closely with engineering teams to improve developer experience and environment consistency

🚀 Why join us now?
Ownership
— Be the first dedicated DevOps engineer and shape the company's infrastructure foundations
Impact
— Work directly with founders and engineering leadership on critical platform decisions

Innovation
— Build infrastructure powering next-generation AI systems and developer tools

Learning
— Gain exposure to Kubernetes, enterprise deployments, cloud infrastructure, and AI workloads at scale

Growth
— Join early and play a key role in defining engineering culture, reliability practices, and platform architecture

🙌 You might be a great fit if you:

• Have 3+ years of experience in DevOps, Platform Engineering, or Site Reliability Engineering

• Have strong hands-on experience with Kubernetes and containerized environments

• Are proficient with CI/CD tools such as Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or similar platforms

• Have experience with Docker, GitOps workflows, and Infrastructure as Code

• Have worked extensively with cloud platforms such as AWS, GCP, or Azure

• Have experience using Terraform, Ansible, Chef, Puppet, or similar automation tools

• Understand networking, security, secrets management, and production operations

• Have experience managing monitoring, logging, and observability systems

• Enjoy troubleshooting complex distributed systems and production issues

• Thrive in fast-moving startup environments with high ownership and autonomy

⚡ Bonus points if you:

• Have experience managing on-premise deployments for enterprise customers

• Have worked with Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Jaeger, or similar observability stacks

• Have implemented GitOps workflows using tools such as ArgoCD or Flux

• Have experience with service mesh technologies and advanced Kubernetes operations

• Have built scalable infrastructure for AI, machine learning, or developer tooling platforms

• Enjoy building developer platforms and improving engineering productivity

As a Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) / DevOps Specialist at our company, your role is vital in managing technical transitions and ensuring the operational stability of our systems supporting a leading Investment Banking client.
• *Key Responsibilities:**
- Manage and oversee technical transitions into production environments.
- Independently drive and manage topics with onshore teams, leveraging strong communication skills.
- Utilize a broad array of technical knowledge in DevOps and SRE principles to facilitate successful transitions.
- Contribute to improving the reliability, scalability, and efficiency of production systems.
- Troubleshoot complex issues and implement effective solutions to minimize downtime.
- Collaborate with development and operations teams to streamline workflows and automate processes.
• *Qualifications Required:**
- Self-driven with a proactive approach to problem-solving.
- Excellent communication skills to effectively manage topics independently with onshore teams.
- Broad technical knowledge applicable to production transitions.
- Strong understanding and practical experience in DevOps methodologies.
- Solid background in Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) practices.

If you are interested in this role, please share your resumes with [HIDDEN TEXT].

What you'll do

As a Senior CI/CD & AI-Enabled DevOps Engineer, you will take ownership of our developer platform and CI/CD ecosystem, driving its evolution toward a highly automated, AI-augmented engineering environment. You will act as a technical leader, shaping architecture, best practices, and the adoption of modern technologies.
Your key accountabilities are:

- Own the design, evolution, and reliability of our CI/CD and developer platform architecture
- Evaluate and introduce new CI/CD, platform engineering, and AI-driven technologies, setting technical direction and standards
- Lead the implementation of AI-powered developer productivity solutions, including:
- Internal AI agents for CI/CD pipelines, incident resolution, and operational automation
- Intelligent assistants to improve developer workflows and reduce cognitive load

- Define and implement patterns for integrating AI using Model Context Protocol (MCP) or similar frameworks, ensuring secure and scalable interactions between LLMs and internal systems
- Drive the development of a self-service internal developer platform, enabling teams to deploy, test, and operate services independently
- Provide technical leadership and mentorship to engineers, promoting best practices in DevOps, platform engineering, and AI adoption
- Lead troubleshooting and resolution of complex system and infrastructure issues, acting as an escalation point
- Collaborate cross-functionally with engineering, security, and product teams to improve developer experience, system reliability, and delivery speed
- Define and enforce observability, reliability, and cost optimization strategies
- Ensure secure adoption of AI technologies, including governance, compliance, and data protection
- Drive documentation, knowledge sharing, and continuous improvement initiatives across the platform

Why we should decide on you

- Bachelors degree in a technical field (Computer Science, Information Systems, or similar)
- 5+ years of experience in DevOps, CI/CD, or Platform Engineering, with demonstrated ownership of production systems
- Strong expertise in CI/CD systems (Jenkins or similar), Linux, and GCP
- Deep experience with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform) and container orchestration (Kubernetes, GKE, Docker, Helm)
- Proven experience designing and operating scalable, reliable distributed systems
- Strong experience with observability stacks (Prometheus, Grafana, Elastic) and performance tuning
- Solid understanding of security best practices (IAM, secrets management, encryption, zero-trust principles)
- Strong programming/scripting skills (Python, Bash, or similar)

AI & Platform Leadership

- Hands-on experience or solid ownership in integrating AI/LLMs into engineering workflows
- Experience designing or implementing agent-based systems or advanced automation solutions
- Understanding of Model Context Protocol (MCP) or similar tool integration patterns
- Experience building or evolving internal developer platforms (IDPs) and improving developer experience at scale
- Ability to evaluate, adopt, and operationalize emerging technologies, balancing innovation with stability

Leadership & Mindset

- Proven ability to lead technical initiatives end-to-end, from design to production
- Strong mentoring skills and experience guiding other engineers
- Excellent problem-solving skills in complex, ambiguous environments
- Strong communication and stakeholder management skills
- High ownership, proactive mindset, and passion for continuous improvement

Nice to have

- GCP certifications
- Experience with ITIL or service management practices
- Familiarity with policy-as-code, governance frameworks, or compliance in AI systems
- Experience in DevEx or platform engineering organizations at scale
- Exposure to FinOps practices and cost optimization in cloud environments

Why you should decide on us

- Lets grow together, join a market leading SaaS company our agile character and culture of innovation enables you to design our future.
- We provide you with the opportunity to take on responsibility and participate in international projects.
- In addition to our buddy-program, we offer numerous individual and wide-ranging training opportunities during which you can explore technical and functional areas.
- Our internal mobility initiative encourages colleagues to transfer cross functionally to gain experience and promotes knowledge sharing.
- We are proud of our positive working atmosphere characterized by a supportive team across various locations and countries and transparent communication across all levels.
- Together we're better - meet your colleagues at our numerous team events.

About us

About Regnology

Regnology is a recognised leader in regulatory, risk, tax, finance reporting as well as supervisory technology, connecting regulators and the regulated across more than 100 countries.

Serving Tier 1 banks, regional institutions, corporates, insurers, and authorities What

AgenticXP Engineer

To be successful in this role, candidates should demonstrate:

• Proven experience designing and executing large-scale Jenkins-to-GitHub Actions migration programs across multiple teams and repositories.

• Strong platform engineering experience, including reusable workflows, CI/CD standards, golden paths, and self-service developer tooling.

• Experience operating and driving adoption across large engineering estates (e.g., hundreds to thousands of repositories and multiple product teams).

• Deep understanding of GitHub platform governance, repository standards, workflow standardization, and enterprise-wide enablement strategies.

• Strong hands-on experience designing deterministic agentic workflows, with automated validation, quality controls, and predictable outcomes.

• Practical expertise applying AI to software delivery, code understanding, migration activities, testing, and developer productivity use cases.

• The ability to balance governance, scalability, developer experience, and platform adoption while influencing engineering teams through clear and highly usable solutions

Job Description (Senior) Agentic DevXP Engineer
Role Purpose

This role modernizes our software delivery platform and evolves Developer Experience (DevXP) toward an AI-enabled, agentic model. It blends CI/CD platform engineering with practical AI application focused on real engineering problems such as pipeline migration, automation, code understanding, and testing enablement. This is not an AI research role.
Core Mission

Enable faster, safer software delivery with minimal friction by building a standardized, AI-enabled developer platform.
Focus Area Description

CI/CD Modernization

Migrating Jenkins to GitHub Actions
Scalability

Developing reusable workflows and standards
Contextual Readiness

Building "agent-ready" repositories
AI Integration

Designing AI-assisted engineering workflows
Governance

Implementing quality gates and guardrails
Empowerment

Driving developer self-service and platform adoption
Cloud

AWS

Key Responsibilities

CI/CD Modernization

• Migrate legacy Jenkins pipelines to GitHub Actions.

• Build reusable workflows, templates, and standards to reduce fragmentation.

• Improve visibility and observability across all delivery flows.

AI-Assisted Engineering

• Apply AI to accelerate migrations, code analysis, testing, and documentation.

• Create safe, repeatable AI workflows backed by robust validation layers.

Agent-Ready Repositories

• Define and implement repository standards covering metadata, documentation, instructions, and templates.

• Ensure AI tools have sufficient context to operate effectively without compromising security.

Agent Workflows & Guardrails

• Integrate AI into engineering workflows across GitHub, CI/CD, Jira, and related systems.

• Define guardrails around access, validation, peer review, and security.

• Focus on high-value, practical use cases that address immediate bottlenecks.

Platform Adoption

• Onboard engineering teams to standardised CI/CD and AI practices.

• Provide golden paths, documentation, and starter templates.

• Drive adoption through iterative feedback loops and user-centric solutions.

Required Experience
CI/CD & Platform Engineering

• Strong hands-on experience with GitHub Actions and Jenkins.

• Proven track record building reusable workflows and developer tooling.

• Proficiency in Python, Bash, TypeScript, or Go.

• Experience with containers, Kubernetes, and cloud-native delivery practices.

• Deep understanding of GitHub workflows including PRs, CODEOWNERS, and repository standards.

• Ability to unify fragmented environments and drive enterprise-wide adoption.

AI & Agentic Practices

• Hands-on experience with LLM-powered tooling such as GitHub Copilot or Claude.

• Practical application of AI to code understanding, automated testing, and migration tasks.

• Experience managing repository-level AI context (e.g., .github/instructions.md or prompt files).

• Solid grasp of AI risks including hallucinations, security vulnerabilities, and over-automation.

• Experience designing safe, human-in-the-loop AI patterns with manual validation checkpoints.

jobs.job_title: DevOps Lead (Linux | Shell | PM2 | Cybersecurity | AI literacy)
jobs.job_description:
ob Summary

Synechron is seeking a proficient Data Engineer to support the design, development, and maintenance of scalable, efficient data pipelines and enterprise data solutions. The role involves collaborating with cross-functional teams to gather requirements, implement data management strategies, and ensure data quality, security, and availability. The Data Engineer will leverage experience in cloud platforms, big data tools, and modern development practices to enable data-driven decision-making and operational excellence across the organization.

Role purpose

Lead the DevOps function to deliver secure, reliable and scalable build/release/operate capabilities for a Java + ReactJS + NodeJS estate. You’ll own the CI/CD strategy, production operations, automation, and security-by-design practices, while coaching engineers and partnering with Engineering, Cybersecurity, Architecture and Product teams. You’ll also drive practical AI literacy and responsible use of AI tools to improve delivery efficiency and operational outcomes.

Key responsibilities

Platform, automation & operations
• Own and evolve the DevOps operating model (on-call, incident management, change/release governance, runbooks, SLAs/SLOs).
• Build and maintain automation for provisioning, configuration, deployment and operational tasks (basic Linux + shell scripting focus).
• Manage NodeJS process operations using PM2 (ecosystem configs, clustering, log management, restarts, health checks, startup scripts).
• Manage Apache rproxy configuration.
• Ensure high availability, performance and resilience across environments (dev/sit/uat/prod).
• Drive observability: logging, metrics, tracing, alerting, dashboards, and actionable runbooks.

CI/CD & release engineering
• Maintain CI/CD pipelines for Java services and ReactJS/NodeJS applications.
• Implement quality gates (unit/integration tests, security scanning, code quality, artefact integrity).
• Understanding of versioning, artefact repositories, deployment patterns, rollback strategies and release reporting.

Cybersecurity & risk management (DevSecOps)
• Embed security controls into pipelines and runtime operations (shift-left security).
• Ensure secure configuration baselines for Linux hosts and application runtime (hardening, least privilege, secure logging).
• Support threat modelling and remediation tracking; ensure evidence collection for audits and compliance needs.

Leadership & stakeholder management
• Lead, mentor and develop DevOps engineers; set standards, review work, and raise engineering maturity.
• Collaborate with developers, QA, SRE/Operations, DBAs and security teams to remove delivery bottlenecks.
• Communicate clearly with senior stakeholders on risks, delivery status, incidents, and improvement plans.

AI literacy & responsible adoption
• Promote practical AI usage in DevOps (e.g., log analysis, incident triage, pipeline optimization, documentation generation) while ensuring data confidentiality and responsible use.
• Establish guardrails for AI-assisted engineering (prompt hygiene, no sensitive data exposure, validation of outputs, traceability).

Required skills & experience (must-have)
• Basic Linux administration experience in production/non-production environments.
• Strong shell scripting (Bash) for automation, troubleshooting and operational tooling.
• Hands-on experience operating NodeJS applications with PM2 (process management, clustering, monitoring, log rotation, startup).
• Proven DevOps leadership experience (technical lead/lead engineer/DevOps lead) with ownership of delivery and operations.
• CI/CD pipeline engineering experience for Java and JavaScript stacks (ReactJS/NodeJS).
• Solid understanding of Cybersecurity/DevSecOps practices: vulnerability management, secrets, IAM/least privilege, secure configuration, audit evidence.
• Incident management experience (triage, RCA, problem management, post-incident improvements).
• AI literacy: ability to use AI tools effectively and safely to improve productivity and operational outcomes.

Desirable skills (nice-to-have)
• Infrastructure as Code (e.g., Terraform/Ansible) and configuration management.
• Containerization and orchestration (Docker/Kubernetes) if applicable to your environment.
• Observability tooling (e.g., ELK/Splunk, APM tools).
• Oracle PL/SQL understanding, Oracle thick client setup (supporting deployments, coordinating with DBAs).
• Experience with performance tuning, capacity planning and resilience testing.
• Experience working in regulated environments with strong controls and audit requirements.

Qualifications
• Degree in Computer Science/Engineering (or equivalent experience).
• Cloud certifications are beneficial
• Team uplift: clear standards, improved automation coverage, and stronger cross-team collaboration.
• Tooling specifics (Jenkins/GitLab/GitHub Actions, Nexus/Artifactory, Splunk, etc.)
